Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., T:415.563.9301, for plaintiffs/moving party;
Jessica Alexandra, Esq, T:415.500.6089, for defendant/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling:

PLAINTIFFS BIANA CHERNOGUZ and VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is DENIED. The new claims sought to be alleged by the plaintiffs are already encompassed by the Rent Board case, which is the subject of CPF-16-515041, a case pending in this court. Granting the relief sought by plaintiffs not only contravenes the November 3, 2017 demurrer order by Judge Quidachay in this case, but violates well-established principles of alleging claims involving the same primary right in two different lawsuits. The court expresses no view whether the claims sought to be alleged by plaintiffs could be permissibly alleged in case 515041.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
